channel.title: reverse-engineering on Mystify
channel.description: Recent content in reverse-engineering on Mystify

item.title: Union CTF 2021 (I): exah
item.description: I was playing Union CTF with @blackb6a last week. Since this CTF is prepared by cr0wn where Jack and hyperreality were in (they made CryptoHack), I am convinced that the CTF will be fun. I wasn't disappointed at all. I am planning to write three or four posts on the challenges, and the first of the series covers on exah, the reversing challenge I spent most of my time. Although I was not able to solve it during the game, I think it is still worthwhile to note it down.
